name: Scientific Writing
description: Composes research manuscripts in IMRAD structure with reporting-guideline compliance (CONSORT, STROBE, PRISMA), citation management, publication-quality figures, and LaTeX/PDF formatting.

evidence.notes: Chamoun et al. (ACL 2024 Findings) — SWIFT: automated focused feedback for scientific writing; multi-component LLM system (planner, investigator, reviewer, controller) rated more specific and helpful than human reviewers on 300 peer-reviewed manuscripts.
